summary: Iteration 140 - Frontend testing for 4 UI restructuring changes: Personal Dashboard tabs, Overview tab content, Xplan LHS sidebar, Adviser mode Stress Test removal. ALL 4 FEATURES PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: PersonalDashboard.jsx: Tabs correctly ordered as Overview/Retirement/Insights/Wealth Trends/Assets (lines 648-669)
PersonalDashboard.jsx: Overview tab contains Asset Allocation pie chart, Holdings by Entity bar chart, Portfolio Rebalancing Suggestions (lines 849-942)
PersonalDashboard.jsx: NetWorthTrend lazy-loaded in Wealth Trends tab (line 38, 1079-1085)
UnifiedDashboard.jsx: Simplified to render PersonalDashboard embedded directly, no wrapper tabs (lines 14-26)
XplanSyncPage.jsx: Wrapped with <Layout> component for LHS sidebar navigation (lines 152-596)
navData.js: adviserBaseNav does NOT contain 'Stress Test' - correctly removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI restructuring changes verified working. Personal Dashboard at /dashboard has tabs: Overview/Retirement/Insights/Wealth Trends/Assets. Overview tab contains merged Portfolio content (Asset Allocation, Holdings by Entity, Portfolio Rebalancing). Xplan page at /xplan has LHS sidebar. Adviser mode sidebar does NOT have Stress Test link. ComplianceModal appears on first visit - dismiss by clicking checkbox then 'I Understand & Accept'.

personal_dashboard_tabs.details: Tabs are Overview/Retirement/Insights/Wealth Trends/Assets in correct order. No Portfolio or Net Worth tabs.

overview_tab_content.details: Overview tab contains: Retirement Readiness, Net Worth, Quick Actions, Smart Insights, Documents & Actions, Asset Allocation pie chart, Holdings by Entity bar chart, Portfolio Rebalancing Suggestions

wealth_trends_tab_position.details: Wealth Trends tab is positioned between Insights (index 2) and Assets (index 4) at index 3

xplan_lhs_sidebar.details: Xplan page wrapped with Layout component, LHS sidebar navigation visible with Dashboard, Markets, Planning, Investments, Tools, Settings

adviser_no_stress_test.details: Stress Test link NOT found in sidebar. Code review confirms adviserBaseNav in navData.js does not contain Stress Test

unified_dashboard_no_wrapper.details: UnifiedDashboard renders PersonalDashboard embedded directly. Only one tablist found (from PersonalDashboard), no wrapper tabs

mocked_apis_list: Demo client data mocked in App.js
Market data fallback to mock when API unavailable
